result_summary.description: A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face. Flanked by angular bracket-like marks (greater-than and less-than shapes) on either side.

A black circular outline containing three filled black dots arranged in a triangular face pattern: two dots on top resembling eyes and one dot below resembling a mouth. The circle is flanked by partial Latin letterforms ('r' on the left, 'x' on the right) that appear to be part of surrounding text.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one dot centered below), resembling a simple face.
A circular outline containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern resembling a simple face with two eyes and a mouth/nose
A circular outline containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple emoticon face.
A simple circular face consisting of an outer circle with two dots arranged horizontally like eyes and a smaller dot centered below them like a mouth.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one below), resembling a simple face.

A circle outline containing three solid dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two upper, one lower), resembling a simple face. A partial dark vertical bar/bracket is visible to the right, likely an adjacent glyph.

A circle containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one dot on bottom), resembling a simple face. Partial characters of script are visible on both the left and right sides of the circle.

A simple face consisting of a circle containing two small dots (eyes) and a smaller dot or short mark below (mouth), flanked by curved bracket-like shapes on the left and right sides resembling a stylized emoticon or character glyph.
A circular outline containing three dots arranged as a simple face: two dots on top (eyes) and one dot below (mouth), stylized as an 'o' character within the word 'roy'.
A circle containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face with two eyes and a mouth.
A circular face with two dots representing eyes in the upper half and one dot below representing a mouth, creating a surprised/shocked expression.

A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern resembling a face (two dots on top like eyes, one dot on the bottom like a mouth), flanked by partial letter-like shapes on either side.
